articles.author: Mosheh Gains, The Associated Press
articles.title: Hegseth lashes out at NATO allies and announces a review of U.S. forces in Europe - NBC News
articles.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth lashed out at NATO allies, announcing a Pentagon review of U.S. forces in Europe.
articles.content: BRUSSELS Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth lashed out at NATO allies on Thursday, announcing a six-month Pentagon review of American forces in Europe that will depend on how fast they take responsibilit… [+3287 chars]
